title: FOOD FOR FAMILIES - 211info
text: STARKER ARTS GARDEN FOR EDUCATION FOOD FOR FAMILIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a program where youth and volunteers grow fruits and vegetables for community members. Produce grown in the garden is donated to local food pantries and social service agencies for distribution. 4485 SW Country Club Drive Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Participants: Low-income families Volunteers: Unrestricted Hours: Hours vary by season Email (541) 753-9211 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 753-9211 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton County Services: Community Gardening Food Donation Programs Volunteer Opportunities Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - FAMILY PROGRAMMING LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SUMMER CAMPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
